aiBriefing.summary: 5 unreplied emails need attention, led by a ~42 Lac INR payment dispute with TrustSignal that's been escalating. A candidate for your PM role has backed out 2 days before joining. You have 6 actionable Jira tickets in New status (mostly finance approvals). 10 Slack DMs are pending including an AWS access approval request from Mrigank.
highlights: URGENT: TrustSignal payment dispute (~42L) - Prashant Kumar requesting Google Meet to resolve credit note issue
HIRING: Candidate Sukhvinder Singh declined PM offer (joining was 25 Mar) - need backfill plan
SAADAA KwikShip agreement pending since 6 Mar - follow up with Harshita/Mrigank
Beardo RCS onboarding blocked on their Contact Us page update (deadline: this week)
Mrigank needs AWS access approval for Tellephant Webhook Logs

actionItems.text: Respond to TrustSignal on ~42L outstanding payment - clarify credit note reason or approve payment release. They want a Google Meet call.
Decide next steps for PM backfill - candidate Sukhvinder Singh declined offer (joining was 25 Mar)
Follow up on Beardo RCS onboarding - they need to update Contact Us page this week
Close SAADAA KwikShip agreement - pending since 6 Mar, follow up with Harshita/Mrigank
Review GoSwift/Zerox integration list and respond with decision
Approve Tellephant AWS Access for Webhook Logs (requested by Mrigank)
